headline: Celsius, Carnival Corp., MongoDB Are Among Top 10 Large Cap Losers Last Week (March 2-March 6): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: These large-cap laggards sank last week as investors reacted to earnings misses, weak outlooks, takeover pressure, higher yields, and rising geopolitical and AI-demand fears.

headline: Oil Shock, Stagflation Fears, and a Bright Spot in AI — Wall Street Ends the Week in the Red
summary: Surging crude prices driven by the war in Iran, a deeply disappointing jobs report, and rising stagflation anxiety sent Wall Street sharply lower on Friday. But not everything was gloomy, Marvell Technology delivered an earnings beat that reminded investors AI infrastructure demand is very much alive.

headline: Carnival Marks Grand Turk Milestone As Long Term Port Story Evolves
summary: Carnival Corporation & (NYSE:CCL) is marking the 20th anniversary of the Grand Turk Cruise Center. The company is launching a new "Grand Turk Cruise Center Community Day" to celebrate its partnership with the Turks and Caicos Islands. The milestone focuses on community engagement, tourism support, and long term collaboration with local stakeholders. Carnival Corporation & (NYSE:CCL), currently trading at $25.79, is highlighting its long term role in Grand Turk as investors weigh a mixed...
